arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt defender Nathaniel Brown has been linked with multiple Premier League clubs in recent weeks. According to TBR football, the defender is being looked at by the likes of Arsenal, Manchester City, West Ham United and Tottenham Hotspur. arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Live text coverage of Wolves vs Tottenham is also being provided on Sunday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off. Audio coverage of the pre-match build-up, full 90 minutes and post-match reaction of Wolves vs Tottenham is available via Wolves TV and the Wolves App.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur travel to Molineux to face Wolverhampton Wanderers this weekend. On Thursday, Ange Postecoglou’s side were held at home in the first leg of their Europa League quarter-final with Frankfurt. With the tie still all to play for, Postecoglou is likely to make alterations. arts.ttl: Chelsea willing to offer €35m for Tottenham-linked star, but Spurs have advantage in race
arts.sum: Chelsea have been linked with a move for the Atletico Madrid midfielder Johnny Cardoso at the end of the season. According to a report from Fichajes, they would be willing to offer €35 million in order to sign the 23-year-old United States international. arts.ttl: What Tottenham's new CEO will bring from Arsenal and how it will affect Daniel Levy
arts.sum: Other clubs, both in the Premier League and abroad, had been eyeing up Venkatesham but Tottenham moved quickly to create the new role in N17 for a man well known to chairman Daniel Levy . The club announced on Friday that the 44-year-old former Arsenal supremo would be arriving in the months after the end of this current season to bring his experience across north London to the team in white after a year out of the game deciding on his next move.
